composed.title: Transaction financial diagnosis
composed.headline: Contribution-positive transaction with a residual funding gap of 30000.00 EUR.
facts: Net revenue 60000.00 EUR; gross contribution 14500.00; operating contribution 13000.00; contribution margin 0.2500000000.
Peak cash deficit -40000.00 EUR on 2026-08-10; recovery 2026-10-15.
Working capital: gross peak requirement 40000.00 EUR; internal liquidity applied 0.00; committed facilities applied 10000.00; residual funding gap 30000.00 from 2026-08-10 for 66 days.

analysis.key_sensitivities: Most material driver: the largest dated outflow in the cash-flow timeline; re-run with scenario overrides on event amounts for exact deltas.

composed.recommended_action: Address the 30000.00 EUR residual funding gap before 2026-08-10; a financing-need classification and options comparison are the structured next outcomes.
rationale_points: The residual funding gap after internal liquidity and committed facilities is 30000.00 EUR.
composed.next_step: Run financing_need_classification on this transaction; a protected-action proposal (e.g. submit_funding_request) could be prepared later only after human review.
